name: German Payslip
description: German Lohn-/Gehaltsabrechnung. Detects Steuerident-Nr., Rentenversicherungs-Nr., Krankenversicherungs-Nr., German dates, German phone numbers and BIC, plus names, addresses and IBAN. Disables the noisy generic 'Amounts' detector so salary figures in tables aren't over-redacted.

patterns.name: Rentenversicherungsnummer
patterns.description: German pension insurance number (8 digits + 1 uppercase letter + 3 digits, case-sensitive)

patterns.name: Krankenversicherungsnummer
patterns.description: German health insurance number (1 uppercase letter + 9 digits, case-sensitive)

patterns.name: German phone number
patterns.description: German phone numbers — +49 or 0 prefix, with various separators

patterns.name: BIC / SWIFT
patterns.description: BIC/SWIFT bank identifier — 8 or 11 uppercase chars (case-sensitive)
